    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    ClassType
    A program model element representing class types.
    interface 
    TypeParameter
     
    Classes in recoder.abstraction that implement Type
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ArrayType
    A program model element representing array types.
    class 
    IntersectionType
    Represents an intersection type, which was introduced in java 5.
    class 
    NullType
    A program model element representing the null type.
    class 
    ParameterizedType
    A parameterized type, meaning a generic type plus actual type arguments.
    class 
    PrimitiveType
    A program model element representing primitive types.

  • Uses of Type in recoder.kit

    Methods in recoder.kit with parameters of type Type
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Literal
    ExpressionKit.createDefaultValue(ProgramFactory f, NameInfo ni, Type t)
    Factory method that creates the default literal to a given type.
    static TypeReference
    TypeKit.createTypeReference(ProgramFactory f, Type t)
    Factory method that creates a new type reference derived by the name of the given type.
    static TypeReference
    TypeKit.createTypeReference(ProgramFactory f, Type t, boolean addTypeArgs)
     
    static TypeReference
    TypeKit.createTypeReference(SourceInfo si, Type t, ProgramElement context)
    Factory method that creates a new type reference derived by the name of the given type and tries to minimize its qualification using the given context for the type reference.
    static VariableDeclaration
    VariableKit.createVariableDeclaration(ServiceConfiguration sc, ProgramElement context, Type t)
    Creates a new local variable declaration with the given type and a new artificial name.
    static VariableDeclaration
    VariableKit.createVariableDeclaration(ServiceConfiguration sc, ProgramElement context, Type t, String guess)
    Deprecated.
    use createNewVariableName instead
    static String
    VariableKit.getNewVariableName(SourceInfo si, Type type, ProgramElement context)
    Query method that finds a name for a new variable with the given type.
    static String[]
    VariableKit.getNewVariableNames(SourceInfo si, Type[] types, ProgramElement context)
    Query method that finds names for new variables with the given types.
    static List<TypeReference>
    TypeKit.getReferences(CrossReferenceSourceInfo xr, Type t, NonTerminalProgramElement root, boolean scanTree)
    Query that retrieves all references to a given type that are contained within the given tree.
    Method parameters in recoder.kit with type arguments of type Type
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static List<Method>
    MethodKit.getAllRelatedMethods(CrossReferenceSourceInfo xrsi, ClassType type, String methodName, List<Type> signature)
    Query that returns a list of methods would redefine, implement or are overriden or implemented each other starting from method methodName in type with specified signature .
    static List<Method>
    MethodKit.getAllRelatedMethods(NameInfo ni, CrossReferenceSourceInfo xrsi, ClassType type, String methodName, List<Type> signature)
     
    static Method
    MethodKit.getDefinedMethod(ClassType type, String name, List<Type> signature)
    Query returning a method locally defined in the given type with the given name and signature.
    static List<Method>
    MethodKit.getRedefinedMethods(NameInfo ni, ClassType base, String name, List<Type> signature)
    Query returning the methods which a method in the given class with the given name and signature would redefine.

    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description

    Create a generator for names based on the given type name.

    List<? extends Constructor>
    ProgramModelInfo.getConstructors(ClassType ct, List<Type> signature)
    Returns the list of most specific constructors that are defined in the given type and have a signature that is compatible to the given one.

    DefaultProgramModelInfo.getMethods(ClassType ct, String name, List<Type> signature)

    DefaultProgramModelInfo.getMethods(ClassType ct, String name, List<Type> signature, List<? extends TypeArgument> typeArgs)
    calls getMethods with context = ct
    List<Method>
    DefaultProgramModelInfo.getMethods(ClassType ct, String name, List<Type> signature, List<? extends TypeArgument> typeArgs, ClassType context)
     
    List<Method>
    ProgramModelInfo.getMethods(ClassType ct, String name, List<Type> signature)
    Returns the list of most specific methods with the given name that are defined in the given type or in a supertype where they are visible for the given type, and have a signature that is compatible to the given one.
    List<Method>
    ProgramModelInfo.getMethods(ClassType ct, String name, List<Type> signature, List<? extends TypeArgument> typeArgs)
     
    List<Method>
    ProgramModelInfo.getMethods(ClassType ct, String name, List<Type> signature, List<? extends TypeArgument> typeArgs, ClassType context)
    Returns the list of most specific methods with the given name that are defined in the given type or in a supertype where they are visible for a second given type, and have a signature that is compatible to the given one.

    Checks if the first signature is compatible to the second one.
